assertion_results.text: Impact map or task descriptions explicitly flag at least 3 ambiguities from the feature description
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md Ambiguity Analysis section explicitly flags 4 ambiguities: (1) '"Search should be faster": Interpreted as adding database-level full-text search indexes', (2) '"Results should be more relevant": Interpreted as implementing PostgreSQL full-text search ranking (ts_rank)', (3) '"Add filters": Interpreted as extending the search endpoint...to accept filter parameters for entity type, date range, and severity', (4) '"Should be fast enough" (non-functional): Interpreted as a requirement to ensure search queries complete within acceptable response times'. All four are direct ambiguities from the vague feature description in feature-ambiguous.md.

assertion_results.text: Plan acknowledges that 'Better UI' (non-MVP) cannot be planned without design mockups or frontend repository and excludes it from scope
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md does not mention 'Better UI' at all. The non-MVP requirement 'Better UI — Make it look nicer' from the feature description is simply absent from the outputs. While it is effectively excluded from scope (no task addresses it), the plan does not explicitly acknowledge why it cannot be planned — there is no mention of missing design mockups or the absence of a frontend repository. The exclusion is implicit, not explicit.

assertion_results.text: Tasks still follow the task-description-template.md format despite ambiguous requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files follow the template format from task-description-template.md. Each contains the required sections: Repository, Description, Files to Modify (or Files to Create), Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, and Dependencies. Optional sections like API Changes (tasks 3, 4), Verification Commands (tasks 1, 5), Documentation Updates (task 4), and Reuse Candidates (tasks 1-5) are included where applicable and omitted where not, per template rules.

assertion_results.text: Tasks document assumptions where they fill in missing details, labeled as assumptions pending clarification
assertion_results.evidence: While the impact-map.md documents interpretations of ambiguous requirements (e.g., 'Interpreted as adding database-level full-text search indexes'), these are labeled as 'Interpreted as' statements in an 'Ambiguity Analysis' section, not as 'assumptions pending clarification'. None of the 5 task description files contain any section or label called 'Assumptions' or mention 'pending clarification'. The tasks present their interpreted requirements as definitive design decisions rather than assumptions awaiting confirmation.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain a '## Repository' section with exactly one repository name: task-1 has 'trustify-backend' (line 3), task-2 has 'trustify-backend' (line 3), task-3 has 'trustify-backend' (line 3), task-4 has 'trustify-backend' (line 3), task-5 has 'trustify-backend' (line 3). No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain all three required sections: Task 1 has '## Description' (line 6), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 43), '## Test Requirements' (line 51). Task 2 has '## Description' (line 6), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 49), '## Test Requirements' (line 58). Task 3 has '## Description' (line 6), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 59), '## Test Requirements' (line 69). Task 4 has '## Description' (line 6), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 60), '## Test Requirements' (line 69). Task 5 has '## Description' (line 6), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 52), '## Test Requirements' (line 63).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Most file paths reference real paths from repo-backend.md, but some are invented. Task 1 'Files to Create' references 'migration/src/m0002_search_indexes/mod.rs' — this path does not exist in repo-backend.md (it follows the pattern of m0001_initial but is a new path, which is acceptable for Files to Create). Task 4 'Files to Create' references 'modules/search/src/model/mod.rs' — the search module in repo-backend.md has no model/ directory, so this is a new path (acceptable for Files to Create). However, all 'Files to Modify' paths check out: 'migration/src/lib.rs', 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs', 'modules/search/src/lib.rs', 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs', 'tests/api/search.rs' — all exist in repo-backend.md. Files to Create are by definition new files, so they won't exist in the manifest. PASS on re-evaluation: Files to Modify all reference valid paths, and Files to Create are inherently new paths that follow the established patterns from the repo structure.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks have Implementation Notes referencing specific file paths and code patterns: Task 1 references 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' for migration patterns, specific table names (sbom, advisory, package), and PostgreSQL functions (to_tsvector, GIN indexes). Task 2 references 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs', 'common/src/model/paginated.rs' (PaginatedResults<T>), 'common/src/db/query.rs', 'common/src/error.rs' (AppError), and specific PostgreSQL functions (plainto_tsquery, ts_rank). Task 3 references 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs', 'common/src/error.rs', 'entity/src/' for entity definitions, and 'Axum Query<T> extractor' pattern. Task 4 references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs', 'common/src/model/paginated.rs', and specific derive macros (Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Clone). Task 5 references 'tests/api/search.rs', 'tests/api/sbom.rs', 'tests/api/advisory.rs', and specific assertion pattern 'assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK)'.
